creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174990
update qmapshack to 1.7.1

qmapshack 1.7.1 is out:
https://sourceforge.net/p/qlandkartegt/mailman/message/35365019/
https://sourceforge.net/p/qlandkartegt/mailman/message/35365618/

upgrade is rather trivial (see patch), note added file files/patch-src_gis_CGisListWks.cpp (patch sent upstream, and has been accepted).
